The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] conducted a '''raid''' on [[Yuuzhan Vong]]-occupied [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. The goal was to train new recruits in combat that the New Republic was sure to win, in preparation for a [[Battle of Ebaq|decisive major battle]] later on.
